stories.title: Today Dashboard Screen (Design + Day Navigation)
stories.description: Build the Today dashboard screen to match example-design/today.html and implement the weekday selector and calendar shortcut navigation.
acceptanceCriteria: Today screen matches example-design/today.html (layout, colors, typography, spacing)
Header shows gift icon (Rewards), date title, and menu icon (Settings)
Weekday selector supports selecting days and visually highlighting the selected day
Calendar icon navigates to Entries tab
Daily Journaling card is present with a Check in now CTA
Happiness Recipe section is present (Completed dropdown + Add ingredient + Add goal buttons)
Ask Rosebud section is present with current time range selector UI

stories.title: Daily Check-In Prompts (Time-Based) + Chat Context
stories.description: Implement time-based daily check-in prompts and ensure chat launches with the correct prompt context (system message + AI follow-up).
acceptanceCriteria: Time-based prompt selection matches spec windows (Morning/Afternoon/Evening/Night)
Pressing Today > Check in now opens chat initialized for daily check-in
Chat shows a system message with the chosen prompt title and prompt text
AI sends a follow-up question based on the prompt
Chat input is disabled while AI responds and re-enabled after
Streaming AI responses remain supported

stories.title: Navigation Alignment (5-item Tab Bar + Header Links)
stories.description: Align navigation to the spec: 5-item bottom nav (Today, Explore, centered FAB, Entries, Settings) and header actions (Gift -> Rewards, Menu -> Settings).
acceptanceCriteria: Bottom navigation renders 5 items with centered elevated FAB (per today.html)
Active tab styling matches designs
FAB always visible and creates a new entry (opens chat)
Gift icon navigates to Rewards screen
Menu icon navigates to Settings tab
Navigation works across Today/Explore/Entries/Settings

stories.title: Entry Action Modal (Continue vs New)
stories.description: When tapping an entry in Entries, show an action modal allowing Continue Entry (append messages) or Create New Entry.
acceptanceCriteria: Tapping an entry card opens an action modal (Continue Entry / Create New Entry / Cancel)
Continue Entry opens chat preloaded with existing messages, with prior messages visually indicated as read-only
New messages append to the same entry when continuing
Create New Entry opens a blank chat flow
Modal is dismissible (X or tap outside)

stories.title: Stats Detail Modals (Streak / Entries / Words)
stories.description: Implement tappable stat cards on Today that open detail modals with breakdowns/charts.
acceptanceCriteria: Tapping Streak opens a modal with streak calendar view + stats
Tapping Entries opens a modal with monthly breakdown and totals
Tapping Words opens a modal with word-count trend and average
Modals slide up and dismiss smoothly
Close button (X) present

stories.title: Happiness Recipe (Ingredients + Goals CRUD)
stories.description: Implement Happiness Recipe management: add/edit/complete/delete ingredients & goals, plus completed screen.
acceptanceCriteria: Add ingredient and Add goal flows use inline input with save/cancel
Items can be toggled completed and move between active/completed sections
Items can be edited (long-press) and deleted (swipe) with undo toast
Completed dropdown navigates to Happiness Recipe screen showing active + completed lists
Haptics/animations are used where appropriate

stories.title: Ask Rosebud (Insights Chat + Time Range)
stories.description: Build Ask Rosebud chat: time range selector, suggested questions, AI insights based on journal history with tappable entry references.
acceptanceCriteria: Ask Rosebud screen exists and is reachable from Today
Time range selector supports All-time/This year/This month/This week
Suggested question cards trigger analysis
AI uses journal history to provide insights and references specific entries with dates
Entry references are tappable and navigate to that entry

stories.title: Rewards Screen (Achievements)
stories.description: Add a Rewards screen accessible via gift icon, showing streak and achievements with progress.
acceptanceCriteria: Rewards screen exists and is reachable via header gift icon
Shows current streak and basic achievement grid
Locked achievements show grayscale and progress indicators
Tapping an achievement shows details
Newly unlocked achievements have a celebration animation (manual verification acceptable)

stories.title: Settings Screen (Theme/Export/About/Privacy)
stories.description: Implement Settings screen per spec with theme selection and stubs for other options.
acceptanceCriteria: Settings tab exists and can be reached via bottom nav and header menu
Theme selection supports Light/Dark/Auto and persists
Notifications entry exists (may be stubbed)
Export Journal entry exists (may be stubbed or basic JSON export)
About and Privacy Policy entries exist

stories.title: Typography & Theme Token Alignment
stories.description: Align typography/colors across screens using theme tokens while matching both example designs (today.html uses Nunito; journal-history.html uses Inter).
acceptanceCriteria: Typography decisions documented (single font or per-screen) and implemented consistently
No hardcoded magic colors in UI (use constants/theme.ts tokens)
Today and Entries screens each match their reference HTML designs
Light/dark mode styling remains legible and consistent

stories.title: Markdown Rendering in React Native
stories.description: Implement markdown rendering for AI chat responses in React Native. Support common markdown elements (headers, bold, italic, lists, code blocks, links) with proper sizing that complements the app's typography.
acceptanceCriteria: Install and configure react-native-markdown-display or similar library
Markdown renders correctly for headers (h1-h6), bold, italic, lists, code blocks, and links
Font sizes are proportional and complement the existing app typography
Markdown renders well in both light and dark mode
ChatMessage component uses markdown rendering for AI responses

stories.title: Therapist-style AI System Prompt
stories.description: Create a thoughtful therapist-style system prompt for the journaling AI. The AI should be reflective, ask open-ended questions, validate emotions, and avoid giving direct advice too quickly. Focus on active listening and helping users explore their thoughts.
acceptanceCriteria: System prompt is added to the AI service configuration
AI responds with reflective, empathetic tone
AI asks open-ended questions to help users explore thoughts
AI validates emotions before offering any suggestions
AI does not jump to giving advice immediately

stories.title: Journal History Screen
stories.description: Create a Journal History screen that matches the example-design/journal-history.html exactly. Include weekly groupings, entry cards with emoji/title, date headers, and the floating action button (FAB) design.
acceptanceCriteria: New JournalHistory screen created with navigation
Design matches journal-history.html exactly (colors, spacing, typography)
Entries grouped by week with date headers
Entry cards show day abbreviation, emoji, and title
FAB (floating action button) with pink edit icon is present
Bottom navigation bar with Today, Explore, Entries, Settings tabs
Light and dark mode supported matching the HTML design

stories.title: Navigation Between Chat and History
stories.description: Implement navigation flow: FAB button on history screen creates new chat, X button on chat screen returns to history. Add tab navigation for the main app sections.
acceptanceCriteria: Pressing FAB (edit button) on history screen navigates to new chat
Pressing X button on chat header returns to journal history
Tab navigation works for Today, Explore, Entries, Settings
Navigation state is properly managed

stories.title: Save and Finish Journal Entry
stories.description: Implement 'Finish Entry' functionality that saves the current chat as a completed journal entry to history. Generate a title and extract mood emoji from the conversation.
acceptanceCriteria: Pressing 'Finish Entry' saves the chat to journal history
Entry is marked as completed (not draft)
Title is generated from conversation content (or AI generates it)
Mood emoji is extracted or inferred from conversation
Entry appears in journal history with correct date grouping
After finishing, user is navigated back to history screen

stories.title: Draft Functionality for Unfinished Entries
stories.description: When user closes a chat (X button) without finishing, auto-save as draft. Drafts appear in a separate tab in journal history and can be resumed.
acceptanceCriteria: Pressing X on chat with content saves entry as draft
Draft entries are stored separately from completed entries
Drafts tab in header or journal history shows draft entries
Tapping a draft entry resumes the chat with previous messages
Draft is converted to completed entry when 'Finish Entry' is pressed

stories.title: Journal Entry Storage Service
stories.description: Create a storage service for persisting journal entries (completed and drafts) using AsyncStorage or similar. Include CRUD operations and data model.
acceptanceCriteria: JournalEntry type defined with id, title, emoji, messages, status (draft/completed), createdAt, updatedAt
Storage service with create, read, update, delete, list operations
Entries persist across app restarts
Service is testable with mock storage
